title: Scheduled ops: competitor digest
request_summary: every morning check competitor news and send a Slack digest only if something changed

skill_suggestions.reason: fresh source retrieval lane when observed browsing is needed
report outline and delivery package lane

no_agent_suitability.reason: The request needs Hermes interpretation, source-backed synthesis, or status narration.

prompt_outline.system_intent: Hermes should prepare a scheduled operation blueprint, not execute the schedule.
prompt_outline.operator_prompt: Prepare scheduled ops for: every morning check competitor news and send a Slack digest only if something changed. Use skills: automation-blueprint, web-research, research-brief, report-package. Cadence: daily. Delivery: slack. Silence mode: only_report_changes. Keep prepared-vs-observed boundaries explicit.
missing_decisions: confirm Hermes/gateway delivery target and evidence source

required_runtime_capabilities: Hermes automation or cron surface for recurring wakeups
Hermes message/gateway surface when delivery outside the current chat is desired
Observed source retrieval or supplied source artifacts for any report content
optional_runtime_capabilities: No-agent watchdog runner for simple threshold checks
Plugin hook status card if OMH plugin is installed and observed by Hermes
Executor-neutral handoff if scheduled follow-up turns into coding work
observed_evidence_required: Hermes host automation or cron listing that references the configured schedule.
Gateway or Hermes message delivery record when delivery is claimed.
Observed source retrieval or supplied source artifacts when research/report content is claimed.
No-agent script/file/run evidence if a no-agent lane is later implemented.
prepared_is_not: A Hermes ops blueprint is projection metadata only. It is not host cron creation, gateway delivery, source retrieval, no-agent execution, plugin load, review, CI, merge-readiness, or merge evidence.

staged_gap_map_stage_contract.implemented: The OMH feature surface exists in local skill, playbook, CLI, or artifact guidance; this is not observed host/runtime execution evidence.
staged_gap_map_stage_contract.prepared_only: This blueprint can prepare policy or intent, but observed host/gateway evidence is still required before claiming execution.
staged_gap_map_stage_contract.supported_elsewhere: The capability is covered by a different OMH surface and is not claimed by this scheduled ops blueprint.

staged_gap_map.scope: scheduled-ops-blueprint projection for schedule, delivery, silence, and status-card guidance
github-event-ops playbook routes issue, PR, CI, and review events into review, triage, label, or fix-handoff cards
agent-board playbook provides task, handoff, heartbeat, blocker, and completion card contracts
memory-sync playbook and memory inspect/apply flows support approve/reject/update cleanup
delivery policy is prepared here; actual platform delivery requires observed Hermes/gateway evidence
executor-neutral handoff and lifecycle artifacts remain separate from scheduled ops blueprints
materials-package and report-package own binary/deliverable QA boundaries
voice-operator playbook turns terse voice/mobile requests into clarify, plan, status, handoff, or confirmation actions
MCP/tool readiness remains setup and probe metadata, not hidden tool execution
ops-observability-card playbook standardizes wrapper-safe token, cost, latency, run-history, and failure-mode boundaries

next_action: Present the blueprint in Hermes, ask for schedule/delivery confirmation, then create host automation only outside this prepared artifact.

status_card.headline: Scheduled ops blueprint prepared
next: confirm Hermes/gateway delivery target and evidence source
